commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 29:15 For we are strangers before you, and sojourners, as were all our fathers: our days on the earth are as a shadow, and there is no abiding. We have nothing but what we have received from thee; and for how short a time. (Calmet) No stay. Hebrew, "none abiding, (Haydock; or) no hope "of being able to escape death, (Calmet) when we must leave all. How happy, therefore, are those who sent their treasures before them. (Haydock) All are pilgrims, with respect to heaven, Hebrews xiii. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
